message:
test(proptest): add 30 property tests for sync module path rules and snapshot filenames (wa-1u90p.7.1)

New proptest_sync.rs: path deny/allow rule enforcement, extra deny
patterns, deny-overrides-allow precedence, snapshot filename format
and roundtrip (version/timestamp/workspace-key/host), determinism,
hostname truncation, different-workspace-different-key, safe char
validation, no path separators, parse robustness with random input,
live DB pattern detection (case insensitive), SyncCategory/SyncItemAction
snake_case serialization, and known-value golden tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
